text:
(Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was taking medication from the hypoglycemic class and whether there was an indication noted for all medications in the drug class. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
^ = Blank
561 DRUG_NONE_TKNG_ADMSN_CD DRUG_NONE_TKNG_ADMSN_CD High-Risk Drug (Is taking): None of above (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents that at the time of admission the patient was not taking any drugs in the high-risk drug classes.
